Describe the computer components displayed and the assembly actions performed.
canonical_answer: Retail boxes for a Corsair liquid cooler and MSI motherboard rest on a wooden surface alongside an Intel Core i5 processor package. A person wearing a grey t-shirt manipulates components on the black motherboard using blue-handled pliers and black cutters. The motherboard sits atop its packaging box on the table. Finally, the board is aligned inside a black computer case featuring hexagonal mesh ventilation and a white cooling fan.

Describe each step of the PC assembly process as it happens in the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, component boxes are arranged on a wooden surface; at 10s, a person places the black motherboard on its box; at 14s, the processor is installed into the socket; at 18s, the motherboard is lowered into the black computer case.
